_comment: Phase 6 (Plan 06-01) schema-drift before-fixture. Snapshot of Slack thread_fetch tool with 2 input params (channel, thread_ts). Pair with slack-after.json to exercise detector.spec.ts changed=true with per-tool diff. The input_schema_hash and output_schema_hash fields are placeholders — Plan 06-04's snapshot.spec.ts computes them at test time via canonicalHash() and the fixtures are used as raw_schema sources.
